examples.target: The painting uses {abstract} shapes.
Philosophy deals with {abstract} concepts.
The report includes an {abstract} at the beginning.
Children often struggle with {abstract} thinking.
Always {cite} your sources in academic writing.
examples.source: Akademik yazıda her zaman kaynaklarınıza atıf yapın.

examples.target: She {cited} three studies to support her argument.
examples.source: Argümanını desteklemek için üç çalışmaya atıf yaptı.

examples.target: The lawyer {cited} a previous case in court.
examples.source: Avukat mahkemede önceki bir davayı örnek gösterdi.

examples.target: Don't forget to {cite} the author's name.
The essay is well organized and {coherent}.
After the accident he was unable to give a {coherent} account.
examples.source: Kazadan sonra tutarlı bir ifade veremedi.

examples.target: A {coherent} argument must be logical.
The policy needs a {coherent} strategy.
examples.source: Politikanın tutarlı bir stratejiye ihtiyacı var.

examples.target: The teacher explained the {concept} clearly.
Democracy is a complex political {concept}.
He came up with a new {concept} for the product.
examples.source: Ürün için yeni bir konsept ortaya koydu.

examples.target: Understanding the basic {concept}s is essential.
The main {criterion} for selection is experience.
She met every {criterion} for the job.
What are the {criterion}s for this award?
Safety is the most important {criterion}.
From the evidence, we can {deduce} the cause.
Sherlock {deduced} the suspect's identity quickly.
Scientists {deduce} theories from observations.
Can you {deduce} what happened from these clues?
examples.source: Bu ipuçlarından ne olduğunu çıkarabilir misin?

examples.target: The theory is supported by {empirical} evidence.
{Empirical} research is based on observation.
He prefers {empirical} methods over theoretical ones.
examples.source: Teorik yöntemler yerine ampirik yöntemleri tercih eder.

examples.target: The findings are {empirical}ly verified.
The scientist tested her {hypothesis} in the lab.
examples.source: Bilim insanı hipotezini laboratuvarda test etti.

examples.target: A {hypothesis} must be testable.
The {hypothesis} was proven wrong by the experiment.
examples.source: Hipotez, deney tarafından yanlış olduğu kanıtlandı.

examples.target: He proposed a new {hypothesis} about evolution.
examples.source: Evrim hakkında yeni bir hipotez öne sürdü.

examples.target: The {implication} of the data is worrying.
He didn't understand the {implication} of his words.
The {implication}s of this policy are far-reaching.
The report has important {implication}s for education.
examples.source: Rapor, eğitim için önemli çıkarımlar içeriyor.

examples.target: Different people {interpret} art differently.
She was hired to {interpret} at the conference.
How do you {interpret} this data?
The lawyer {interpreted} the law in her client's favor.
The research {methodology} was clearly outlined.
Their {methodology} involved interviews and surveys.
A sound {methodology} ensures reliable results.
examples.source: Sağlam bir metodoloji güvenilir sonuçlar sağlar.

examples.target: The professor critiqued the {methodology} of the paper.
The internet created a new {paradigm} for communication.
examples.source: İnternet, iletişimde yeni bir paradigma yarattı.

examples.target: A {paradigm} shift changed the field of science.
examples.source: Bir paradigma kayması bilim alanını değiştirdi.

examples.target: She challenged the existing {paradigm}.
This discovery offers a new {paradigm} for medicine.
examples.source: Bu keşif, tıp için yeni bir paradigma sunuyor.

examples.target: He tried to {refute} the claims made against him.
The experiment {refuted} the hypothesis.
She {refuted} the argument with strong evidence.
It is hard to {refute} the findings of the study.
There was a {significant} improvement in her grades.
This is a {significant} moment in history.
The data shows {significant} differences.
Her contribution was {significant} to the team's success.
The paper {synthesize}s research from multiple fields.
examples.source: Makale birden fazla alandan araştırmayı sentezliyor.

examples.target: She can {synthesize} complex information clearly.
Plants {synthesize} glucose through photosynthesis.
The goal is to {synthesize} the findings.
His {ambition} drove him to work harder.
examples.source: Hırsı onu daha sıkı çalışmaya itti.

examples.target: She has great {ambition} to become a doctor.
examples.source: Doktor olmak için büyük hırsı var.

examples.target: {Ambition} without effort rarely leads to success.
His early {ambition} was to travel the world.
She works closely with her {colleague}s.
A {colleague} recommended me for the job.
examples.source: Bir iş arkadaşı beni iş için tavsiye etti.

examples.target: His {colleague}s appreciated his hard work.
examples.source: Meslektaşları onun sıkı çalışmasını takdir etti.

examples.target: I shared the report with my {colleague}.
The job requires technical {competence}.
She demonstrated her {competence} through the project.
Language {competence} is tested in the exam.
His {competence} in data analysis is impressive.
She signed a two-year {contract}.
The {contract} includes all payment terms.
He broke the {contract} by quitting early.
Read the {contract} carefully before signing.
A good manager knows how to {delegate} tasks.
examples.source: İyi bir yönetici görevleri nasıl devredeceğini bilir.

examples.target: She {delegated} the presentation to her assistant.
He tends to {delegate} responsibility to others.
{Delegate} the work you don't need to do yourself.
examples.source: Kendinizin yapmak zorunda olmadığı işleri devredin.

examples.target: We need to {evaluate} the risks carefully.
The committee will {evaluate} all applications.
She was asked to {evaluate} the new software.
Teachers {evaluate} students' progress regularly.
examples.source: Öğretmenler öğrencilerin gelişimini düzenli olarak değerlendirir.

examples.target: Her manager gave her constructive {feedback}.
examples.source: Müdürü ona yapıcı geri bildirim verdi.

examples.target: Please share your {feedback} after the session.
examples.source: Lütfen oturum sonrası geri bildiriminizi paylaşın.

examples.target: {Feedback} helps people grow professionally.
examples.source: Geri bildirim insanların mesleki açıdan gelişmesine yardımcı olur.

examples.target: She welcomed all {feedback}, positive or negative.
examples.source: Olumlu ya da olumsuz her türlü geri bildirimi memnuniyetle karşıladı.

examples.target: She took the {initiative} to solve the problem.
The company launched a new sustainability {initiative}.
examples.source: Şirket yeni bir sürdürülebilirlik girişimi başlattı.

examples.target: He showed great {initiative} in the project.
Leadership requires the ability to take {initiative}.
She found a {mentor} who guided her career.
A good {mentor} shares knowledge and experience.
examples.source: İyi bir mentor bilgi ve deneyim paylaşır.

examples.target: He acted as a {mentor} to younger employees.
examples.source: Daha genç çalışanlar için mentor görevi üstlendi.

examples.target: Having a {mentor} can accelerate professional growth.
examples.source: Bir mentora sahip olmak mesleki büyümeyi hızlandırabilir.

examples.target: She {negotiate}d a higher salary.
examples.source: Daha yüksek bir maaşı müzakere etti.

examples.target: The two countries {negotiate}d a peace deal.
examples.source: İki ülke barış anlaşmasını müzakere etti.

examples.target: You can {negotiate} the price at the market.
It's important to {negotiate} calmly.
What is the main {objective} of this project?
She met all her quarterly {objective}s.
The {objective} is to increase customer satisfaction.
Set clear {objective}s before starting a task.
examples.source: Bir göreve başlamadan önce net hedefler belirleyin.

examples.target: Her {performance} at work has been outstanding.
The actor gave a brilliant {performance}.
The company reviews {performance} every six months.
examples.source: Şirket her altı ayda bir performansı değerlendirir.

examples.target: Low {performance} can affect the whole team.
Working from home boosted her {productivity}.
High {productivity} leads to better results.
examples.source: Yüksek verimlilik daha iyi sonuçlara yol açar.

examples.target: The new system improved overall {productivity}.
Distractions lower {productivity}.
He submitted his {resignation} last Friday.
Her {resignation} came as a surprise to everyone.
The CEO's {resignation} was announced publicly.
She accepted the situation with {resignation}.
Her {workload} has doubled this month.
examples.source: Bu ay iş yükü iki katına çıktı.

examples.target: He struggled to manage his heavy {workload}.
examples.source: Ağır iş yüküyle başa çıkmakta zorlandı.

examples.target: The new hire reduced the team's {workload}.
examples.source: Yeni işe alım, takımın iş yükünü azalttı.

examples.target: Balancing {workload} is key to avoiding burnout.
examples.source: İş yükünü dengelemek tükenmişliği önlemede kilit unsurdur.

examples.target: Language is sometimes a {barrier} to communication.
examples.source: Dil, zaman zaman iletişimde bir engel oluşturur.

examples.target: Police set up a {barrier} around the area.
Cost can be a {barrier} to education.
examples.source: Maliyet, eğitimin önünde bir engel olabilir.

examples.target: She broke down every {barrier} in her career.
Under no {circumstance}s should you share your password.
The {circumstance}s of the accident are unclear.
She adapted to changing {circumstance}s easily.
Financial {circumstance}s forced him to move.
examples.source: Mali koşullar onu taşınmak zorunda bıraktı.

examples.target: He didn't think about the {consequence}s.
Pollution has serious {consequence}s for health.
examples.source: Kirliliğin sağlık üzerinde ciddi sonuçları var.

examples.target: The {consequence} of careless driving can be fatal.
Every action has a {consequence}.
There is a clear {distinction} between the two ideas.
examples.source: İki fikir arasında belirgin bir ayrım var.

examples.target: She graduated with {distinction}.
The law makes no {distinction} based on gender.
examples.source: Yasa, cinsiyete dayalı herhangi bir ayrım yapmaz.

examples.target: He drew a {distinction} between fact and opinion.
examples.source: Gerçek ile görüş arasında bir ayrım çizdi.

examples.target: Every rule has an {exception}.
He made an {exception} for her.
The policy allows no {exception}s.
She was the {exception} rather than the rule.
Age is an important {factor} in health.
Several {factor}s contributed to the accident.
Price is the deciding {factor} for most buyers.
examples.source: Fiyat, çoğu alıcı için belirleyici etkendir.

examples.target: What {factor}s affect language learning?
There is a {gap} between rich and poor.
examples.source: Zengin ve yoksul arasında bir uçurum var.

examples.target: There was a {gap} in the fence.
She returned after a {gap} of two years.
examples.source: İki yıllık bir aradan sonra geri döndü.

examples.target: The {gap} in knowledge needs to be filled.
The company offers financial {incentive}s.
What {incentive} do they have to work harder?
examples.source: Daha sıkı çalışmak için ne gibi teşvikleri var?

examples.target: The government created tax {incentive}s for businesses.
examples.source: Hükümet işletmeler için vergi teşvikleri oluşturdu.

examples.target: Praise is a powerful {incentive} for children.
examples.source: Övgü, çocuklar için güçlü bir teşviktir.

examples.target: Social {interaction} is vital for mental health.
examples.source: Sosyal etkileşim, ruh sağlığı için hayati önem taşır.

examples.target: The teacher encouraged {interaction} in class.
Human-computer {interaction} is a growing field.
Her {interaction} with customers was always positive.
Money is a major {obstacle} for many students.
examples.source: Para, pek çok öğrenci için büyük bir engeldir.

examples.target: She overcame every {obstacle} in her path.
Language can be an {obstacle} in a new country.
examples.source: Yeni bir ülkede dil engel oluşturabilir.

examples.target: Identify {obstacle}s before starting the project.
The {outcome} of the meeting was positive.
We hope for a successful {outcome}.
The {outcome} of the election surprised many.
examples.source: Seçim sonucu pek çok kişiyi şaşırttı.

examples.target: Good preparation leads to better {outcome}s.
examples.source: İyi hazırlık daha iyi sonuçlara yol açar.

examples.target: Try to see things from her {perspective}.
examples.source: Olaylara onun bakış açısından görmeye çalış.

examples.target: From a historical {perspective}, this is unusual.
examples.source: Tarihsel bir perspektiften bakıldığında bu alışılmadık.

examples.target: Travel broadens your {perspective}.
She offered a fresh {perspective} on the problem.
examples.source: Soruna taze bir bakış açısı sundu.

examples.target: Safety is our top {priority}.
She set her {priority}s before starting work.
Education should be a national {priority}.
What is your {priority} right now?
Let's consider the worst-case {scenario}.
The training prepared them for various {scenario}s.
In this {scenario}, what would you do?
The film's {scenario} was based on real events.
The {transition} to renewable energy takes time.
The {transition} from school to work can be challenging.
examples.source: Okuldan iş hayatına geçiş zorlu olabilir.

examples.target: She managed the {transition} smoothly.
The country is in {transition}.
He accepted the offer, {albeit} reluctantly.
examples.source: İsteksiz de olsa teklifi kabul etti.

examples.target: The plan worked, {albeit} with some difficulties.
examples.source: Bazı güçlükler olsa da plan işe yaradı.

examples.target: She joined the team, {albeit} late.
It was a success, {albeit} a small one.
She didn't study; {consequently}, she failed the exam.
The road was blocked; {consequently}, we were late.
examples.source: Yol kapalıydı; sonuç olarak geç kaldık.

examples.target: He was rude; {consequently}, he lost his job.
examples.source: Kaba davrandı; sonuç olarak işini kaybetti.

examples.target: {Consequently}, the decision was reversed.
{Furthermore}, the plan requires additional funding.
The project was on time and, {furthermore}, under budget.
examples.source: Proje zamanında hem de bütçenin altında tamamlandı.

examples.target: She is qualified; {furthermore}, she has experience.
examples.source: Nitelikli; bunun yanı sıra deneyimi de var.

examples.target: {Furthermore}, studies show it is effective.
The data was incorrect; {hence}, the results were wrong.
examples.source: Veriler yanlıştı; bu nedenle sonuçlar hatalıydı.

examples.target: {Hence}, further research is needed.
examples.source: Bu nedenle daha fazla araştırmaya ihtiyaç var.

examples.target: He was ill; {hence}, his absence.
{Hence} the term 'artificial intelligence'.
She smiled; I did {likewise}.
examples.source: Gülümsedi; ben de aynı şekilde yaptım.

examples.target: {Likewise}, the second test showed similar results.
examples.source: Benzer biçimde, ikinci test de benzer sonuçlar gösterdi.

examples.target: He greeted us warmly; we responded {likewise}.
examples.source: Bizi sıcakça karşıladı; biz de aynı şekilde karşılık verdik.

examples.target: She worked hard; {likewise}, so did her team.
examples.source: Sıkı çalıştı; ekibi de aynı şekilde.

examples.target: She cooked dinner; {meanwhile}, he set the table.
examples.source: Akşam yemeği pişirdi; bu arada o masayı hazırladı.

examples.target: {Meanwhile}, the situation was getting worse.
He waited outside; {meanwhile}, she finished the call.
examples.source: Dışarıda bekledi; bu arada o konuşmayı bitirdi.

examples.target: {Meanwhile}, scientists continue their research.
examples.source: Bu arada bilim insanları araştırmalarını sürdürüyor.

examples.target: It was difficult; {nevertheless}, she succeeded.
The task was risky; {nevertheless}, they proceeded.
examples.source: Görev riskli olmasına karşın devam ettiler.

examples.target: He was tired; {nevertheless}, he kept going.
{Nevertheless}, the project was a success.
examples.source: Yine de proje bir başarı oldu.

examples.target: The journey was long; {nonetheless}, it was worth it.
The evidence was limited; {nonetheless}, a decision was made.
examples.source: Kanıtlar sınırlıydı; buna rağmen karar verildi.

examples.target: She disagreed; {nonetheless}, she supported the team.
{Nonetheless}, the experiment was valuable.
You may go, {provided} you finish your work first.
{Provided} the weather is fine, we'll have a picnic.
examples.source: Hava güzel olduğu sürece piknik yapacağız.

examples.target: He agreed, {provided} the conditions were met.
{Provided} you study, you'll pass the exam.
She continued {regardless} of the criticism.
{Regardless} of cost, quality is essential.
He showed up, {regardless} of how tired he was.
examples.source: Ne kadar yorgun olursa olsun göründü.

examples.target: {Regardless} of the result, they gave their best.
examples.source: Sonuç ne olursa olsun ellerinden gelenin en iyisini yaptılar.

examples.target: The two events happened {simultaneously}.
examples.source: İki olay eş zamanlı olarak gerçekleşti.

examples.target: She was {simultaneously} happy and nervous.
examples.source: Aynı anda hem mutlu hem gergindi.

examples.target: The concert was broadcast {simultaneously} worldwide.
examples.source: Konser aynı anda dünya genelinde yayınlandı.

examples.target: He managed two projects {simultaneously}.
She was {specifically} told not to be late.
I'm {specifically} interested in modern history.
The rule applies {specifically} to minors.
He asked {specifically} about the deadline.
He resigned and was {subsequently} replaced.
examples.source: İstifa etti ve ardından yerine biri getirildi.

examples.target: The law was passed and {subsequently} challenged.
examples.source: Yasa kabul edildi ve ardından itiraz edildi.

examples.target: She was arrested and {subsequently} released.
examples.source: Gözaltına alındı ve sonrasında serbest bırakıldı.

examples.target: {Subsequently}, the findings were published.
She saved money, {thereby} avoiding debt.
He signed the form, {thereby} accepting the terms.
examples.source: Formu imzaladı, bu yolla koşulları kabul etmiş oldu.

examples.target: The upgrade improved speed, {thereby} saving time.
examples.source: Yükseltme hızı artırdı, böylece zaman kazandırdı.

examples.target: {Thereby}, the problem was resolved.
He likes coffee, {whereas} she prefers tea.
examples.source: O kahveyi sever, oysa o çayı tercih eder.

examples.target: {Whereas} some enjoy cold weather, others do not.
examples.source: Bazıları soğuk havadan hoşlanırken diğerleri hoşlanmaz.

examples.target: The first test passed; {whereas} the second failed.
examples.source: İlk test geçti; ikincisi ise başarısız oldu.

examples.target: {Whereas} he is quiet, his brother is outgoing.
We booked {accommodation} near the city center.
examples.source: Şehir merkezinin yakınında konaklama yeri ayırttık.

examples.target: Budget {accommodation} is available for students.
examples.source: Öğrenciler için uygun fiyatlı konaklama mevcuttur.

examples.target: The {accommodation} included breakfast.
She arranged her own {accommodation} for the trip.
Her {baggage} was too heavy for the flight.
Where can I collect my {baggage}?
We left our {baggage} at the hotel.
The airline charges extra for overweight {baggage}.
examples.source: Havayolu, fazla ağır bagaj için ek ücret alır.

examples.target: They crossed the {border} into Canada.
Passport checks are done at the {border}.
The {border} was closed due to the crisis.
She lives near the {border} with France.
The local {currency} is the euro.
Exchange your {currency} before you travel.
The {currency} lost value against the dollar.
examples.source: Para birimi dolar karşısında değer kaybetti.

examples.target: What {currency} do they use in Japan?
You must declare goods at {customs}.
Our bags were checked at {customs}.
She was stopped at {customs} for inspection.
{Customs} regulations vary by country.
Paris is a popular tourist {destination}.
What is your final {destination}?
The {destination} was chosen for its warm climate.
examples.source: Varış noktası ılıman iklimi nedeniyle seçildi.

examples.target: She arrived at her {destination} safely.
She applied for a visa at the {embassy}.
The {embassy} is located in the capital city.
The protest took place outside the {embassy}.
Call your country's {embassy} in an emergency.
The bus {fare} has increased this year.
What is the {fare} to the airport?
She paid the taxi {fare} with cash.
Advance booking offers cheaper {fare}s.
examples.source: Erken rezervasyon daha ucuz bilet fiyatları sunar.

examples.target: The {itinerary} includes three cities in one week.
examples.source: Seyahat planı bir haftada üç şehir içeriyor.

examples.target: She shared the {itinerary} with the group.
A detailed {itinerary} helps avoid confusion.
examples.source: Ayrıntılı bir seyahat planı karışıklığı önler.

examples.target: The {itinerary} was changed due to weather.
She suffered from {jet lag} after the long flight.
examples.source: Uzun uçuşun ardından uçuş yorgunluğu çekti.

examples.target: {Jet lag} can last several days.
He struggled with {jet lag} after crossing time zones.
examples.source: Saat dilimlerini geçtikten sonra jet lag ile mücadele etti.

examples.target: Drinking water helps reduce {jet lag}.
examples.source: Su içmek jet lag'ı azaltmaya yardımcı olur.

examples.target: We had a four-hour {layover} in Dubai.
examples.source: Dubai'de dört saatlik aktarma molası verdik.

examples.target: A long {layover} can be tiring.
examples.source: Uzun bir bekleme molası yorucu olabilir.

examples.target: She used the {layover} to explore the airport.
examples.source: Bekleme süresini havalimanını gezmek için kullandı.

examples.target: The cheapest flights often have a {layover}.
examples.source: En ucuz uçuşların çoğunda aktarma olur.

examples.target: Don't forget to renew your {passport} before traveling.
examples.source: Seyahat etmeden önce pasaportunuzu yenilemeyi unutmayın.

examples.target: She lost her {passport} during the trip.
A valid {passport} is required to enter the country.
examples.source: Ülkeye giriş için geçerli bir pasaport gereklidir.

examples.target: He carried a digital copy of his {passport}.
She bought a {souvenir} magnet from every city.
examples.source: Her şehirden anı magneti satın aldı.

examples.target: The market was full of {souvenir}s.
He kept a {souvenir} from his first trip abroad.
examples.source: İlk yurt dışı gezisinden bir anı sakladı.

examples.target: {Souvenir} shops are popular near tourist sites.
examples.source: Hediyelik eşya dükkanları turistik yerlerin yakınında popülerdir.

examples.target: The goods are in {transit} to the warehouse.
She was in {transit} at the airport for six hours.
{Transit} passengers do not need a visa.
Public {transit} is efficient in this city.
She applied for a student {visa}.
You need a {visa} to enter that country.
examples.source: O ülkeye giriş için vize gerekiyor.

examples.target: His {visa} was rejected by the embassy.
A tourist {visa} is valid for 90 days.
